# llms.txt for WordsCompare
# A free online toolkit with 100+ browser-based tools

## Overview
WordsCompare provides free online tools for PDF conversion, calculators, text utilities, and more. All tools run directly in your browser with no installation required.

## Key Features
- 100+ free online tools
- PDF converters (PDF to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images, and more)
- Smart calculators (Age, BMI, EMI, GST, and more)
- Text utilities (Word counter, case converter, text comparison)
- File converters and generators
- Developer tools (JSON formatter, code utilities)
- All tools work in your browser - no upload to servers

## Tool Categories

### PDF Tools
Convert PDFs to various formats and vice versa. Includes PDF to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images, and repair tools.

### Calculators
Financial and personal calculators including Age, BMI, EMI, GST, HRA, and investment calculators.

### Text Tools
Text manipulation tools including word counter, case converter, find and replace, and text comparison.

### Developer Tools
Code and data utilities including JSON formatter, text to slug converter, and more.

## Usage
All tools are free to use. Simply select a tool, upload your file or enter your data, and get instant results.

## Contact
For support or inquiries, visit the contact page on the website.

## Last Updated
February 2026
